title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 10 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 10 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 10 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/05/2023
DCE iron ore was choppy in the day, the main contract I2309 closed 724,an increase of 0.28% throughout the day. and steel mills purchase with caution. PBF at Shandong port dealt 788-805 yuan/mt; prices are mixed today over yesterday.
